# EBS Documentation — Full Causal Graph

> EBS (Event Broadcasting System) — 완전한 인과관계 그래프 + DEV 정본 기술 명세 + Confluence ID 매핑.
> 기준 정책: docs/1. Product/Product_SSOT_Policy.md (§8 인과관계 매핑)
> 검증 도구: python tools/ssot_verify.py

---

## Causal Map (POL ↔ DEV)

Document A defines the policy that Document B implements:

- POL-01 [Foundation.md] is the SSOT root — all PRDs derive their identity from it.
- DEV-01 [2.1 Frontend/Lobby/Overview.md] defines the technical spec → POL-02 [Lobby.md] is its external PRD derivative.
- DEV-02 [2.2 Backend/Back_Office/Overview.md] defines the technical spec → POL-04 [Back_Office.md] is its external PRD derivative.
- DEV-03 [2.3 Game Engine/Rules/Multi_Hand_v03.md] defines the betting rules → POL-06 [Game_Rules/Betting_System.md] is its external PRD derivative.
- DEV-04 [2.4 Command Center/Command_Center_UI/Overview.md] defines the technical spec → POL-03 [Command_Center.md] is its external PRD derivative.

---

## Product Nodes (POL) — Full Manifest

| ID | Path | Confluence ID | Confluence URL | derivative-of |

---

## Development Nodes (DEV) — Technical Spec Primary Sources

| DEV ID | Path (docs/2. Development/ 기준) | Owner Stream | PRD 관계 |
|:------:|----------------------------------|:------------:|---------|
| DEV-01 | 2.1 Frontend/Lobby/Overview.md | S2 | POL-02의 derivative 소스 |
| DEV-02 | 2.2 Backend/Back_Office/Overview.md | S7 | POL-04의 derivative 소스 |
| DEV-03 | 2.3 Game Engine/Rules/Multi_Hand_v03.md | S8 | POL-06의 derivative 소스 |
| DEV-04 | 2.4 Command Center/Command_Center_UI/Overview.md | S3 | POL-03의 derivative 소스 |

---

## Key Contracts (docs/2. Development/ — tier: contract)

- 2.2 Backend/APIs/WSOP_LIVE_Chip_Count_Sync.md — WSOP LIVE 칩카운트 웹훅 수신 계약 (HMAC-SHA256 + replay protection)
- 2.2 Backend/APIs/Backend_HTTP.md — REST API 카탈로그
- 2.2 Backend/APIs/WebSocket_Events.md — WS 이벤트 카탈로그
- 2.2 Backend/APIs/Players_HandHistory_API.md — Players + Hand History cursor pagination API
- 2.5 Shared/Chip_Count_State.md — Engine vs WSOP LIVE chipstack reconcile FSM

---

## Stream Ownership Matrix

| Stream | 코드 | Product 파일 소유 | Development 파일 소유 |
|--------|:----:|-------------------|----------------------|
| S1 (Foundation) | S1 | Foundation.md, Back_Office.md*, Game_Rules/** | — |
| S2 (Lobby) | S2 | Lobby.md | 2.1 Frontend/Lobby/** |
| S3 (CC) | S3 | Command_Center.md | 2.4 Command Center/** |
| S7 (Backend) | S7 | — | 2.2 Backend/** |
| S8 (Engine) | S8 | — | 2.3 Game Engine/** |

*S1 interim — Back_Office 이관 대기

---

## Validation

Run to verify all POL/DEV causal chains + Confluence IDs + llms.txt coverage:

```bash
python tools/ssot_verify.py
# Expected: OVERALL PASS (exit 0)
```

Expected checks:
- derivative-of chain: 4 POL nodes with valid DEV backlinks
- Confluence page-id: 10 files with numeric ID
- llms.txt coverage: 10 Product docs all mentioned
